title: Treasury Executive (Funding Support)
description:
Position Summary

This role is responsible for daily capital operations, payments, bank liaison, funding partner documentation support, and capital ledger management. It is a key position within the Group’s Singapore Capital & Arbitrage Center.

Key Responsibilities

1. Daily Capital Operations

- Execute payments, remittances, and fund transfers

- Monitor daily balances and update capital ledgers

- Prepare banking documents and follow up funds status

- Assist in completing monthly funding reports and fund pool reports.

2. Bank & Funding Partner Support

- Prepare KYC, certifications, and company documents

- Support LC/DP/BBLC/Cashback LC documentation

- Assist funding partner communication and updates

3. Financing Project Support

- Support financing documentation preparation

- Track financing progress and maintain records

- Assist with meeting notes and data filing

4. Documentation & Process Execution

- Maintain capital ledgers and funding partner files

- Build standardized documentation systems

- Ensure compliance and workflow execution

Requirements

1. Education

Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Business or related fields preferred.

2. Skills

- Strong Excel skills

- Good English reading/writing

- Numerical sensitivity and attention to detail

- Fast learner with interest in finance

3. Competencies

- Strong execution and responsibility

- Confidentiality and risk awareness

- Works well under time-sensitive tasks

4. Preferred

Candidates with banking work (internship) experience will be given priority.

* Fresh graduated are welcome*

postedCompany.description: Founded in 2021, Lin Sheng Group is headquartered in Shanghai, with subsidiaries and offices in Ningbo,  Zhoushan, Beijing, Hong Kong, Singapore and other places. The core members are mainly from large  state-owned enterprises, listed companies, world-renowned foreign enterprises, investment banks, large  domestic and foreign commercial banks and other institutions, with rich financial experience and business  development ability. At the same time, Lin Sheng Group accelerates the introduction and cultivation of top  talents through a competitive talent strategy, staffing for business expansion. With the advantage of our expert team in the bulk industry for many years, Lin Sheng Group aims to  build a comprehensive trade and financial service enterprise, with a diversified, multi-sector as well as  multi-business model, through the strategic layout of the global vision. Lin Sheng Group are both traders and service providers. Based on domestic trade and import and export  trade of bulk commodities, we provide comprehensive and customized financial services throughout the  whole supply chain for enterprises at home and abroad. We offer a vast array in categories including  wood, chemicals, oil products, agricultural products, coal and non-ferrous metals, etc. We have stable  upstream and downstream customers, who are mainly large refineries, state-owned enterprises, urban  investment platforms and listed companies. Under the corporate culture of "Professionalism, Innovation, Integrity, Pragmatism and Altruism", Lin Sheng Group is committed to providing customers with customized trade finance.
postedCompany.name: GRAND COMMODITIES TRADING PTE. LTD.
